properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am found in Your embrace Covered by Your love You're my deepest dream I know Your love so strong, Spirit come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You lift me up to heaven's door You restored my soul I come here without Your touch I need You so much, need You more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're my rock and my redeemer The rock on which I stand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I keep falling in love with You Lord Every beat of my heart, breath that I take Through the seasons that change Your love remains My hiding place, my home Fallin' in love

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lift me up to heaven's door You restored my soul I come here without Your touch I need You so much, need You more
